'''lalupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachtee|yachtee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachtee|yachtee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lalupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lælipith|lælipith]] || [[word:lælipij|lælipij]] || [[word:lælipish|lælipish]] || [[word:lælipi|lælipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:laluluputh|laluluputh]] || [[word:lalulupuj|lalulupuj]] || [[word:lalulupush|lalulupush]] || [[word:lalulupu|lalulupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:laluputh|laluputh]] || [[word:lalupuj|lalupuj]] || [[word:lalupush|lalupush]] || [[word:lalupu|lalupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalufputh|lalufputh]] || [[word:lalufpuj|lalufpuj]] || [[word:lalufpush|lalufpush]] || [[word:lalufpuf|lalufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:laluputhu|laluputhu]] || [[word:lalupuju|lalupuju]] || [[word:lalupushu|lalupushu]] || [[word:lalupuku|lalupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:laluputh|laluputh]] || [[word:lalupuj|lalupuj]] || [[word:lalupush|lalupush]] || [[word:lalupu|lalupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:laluputhul|laluputhul]] || [[word:lalupujul|lalupujul]] || [[word:lalupushul|lalupushul]] || [[word:lalupukul|lalupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:laluputhuthu|laluputhuthu]] || [[word:lalupujuju|lalupujuju]] || [[word:lalupushushu|lalupushushu]] || [[word:lalupuku|lalupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:laluputhun|laluputhun]] || [[word:lalupujun|lalupujun]] || [[word:lalupushun|lalupushun]] || [[word:lalupukun|lalupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:laluputhuoro|laluputhuoro]] || [[word:lalupujuoro|lalupujuoro]] || [[word:lalupushuoro|lalupushuoro]] || [[word:lalupukuoro|lalupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
